goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack for BPK-074 release governance operator action runbooks, bundling runbook review and handoff evidence without GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, or deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance runbook evidence can be bundled without executing operator actions.
Ready BPK-074 runbook and evidence refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: The evidence pack feeds later human/operator release review only.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked runbook cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-074 described release governance operator actions as a runbook without executing them.
